reviews.comment:
No tienen baño por que no tienen agua. Trabajan con ypf en ruta y como no tienen el posnet no lo pueden hacer manual. Son desastrosos. Cierren y pongan una churreria u otra cosa. Son una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
They don't have a bathroom because they don't have water. They work with YPF gas stations on the road, and since they don't have a POS terminal, they can't do it manually. They're a disaster. They should close down and open a churro stand or something else. They're a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrZzhMbG93RRAB
